case_title: NORTH AMERICAN COLLECTORS, INC. A CALIF. CORP. vs. DANIELS, LOUISE J. et al

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF NORTH AMERICAN COLLECTORS, INC. A CALIF. CORP. SERVED NOV-01-1994, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT DANIELS, LOUISE J.
